calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPERANCES:
Atty. LUCIEN B. PINO, Esq. of Martensen & Wright PC (Tel: 916-448-9088) for petitioner;
Atty. JAMES H. TURKEN, Esq. of Norton Rose Fulbright US, LLP (Tel: 213-892-9200) for respondent CRMNEXT, Inc.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER JOSEPH SALESKY's Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

The Court instructs petitioner's counsel to submit a proposed order which tracks the language of the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Shayna Montgomery, CSR No. 13452, Email: shaynamontgomery26@gmail.com, Tel: 602-501-5814 (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting petitioner's petition to confirm final arbitration award. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Lucien Pino, Esq. 916-448-9088 Martensen Wright PC for Petitioner.
James Turken, Esq. 310-600-8915 for Respondent CRMNEXT, INC.
Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-517-5439, spham28@yahoo.com, Reported.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces an opposition was filed to the petition. The Court sets a briefing schedule and hearing date. The Court indicates no courtesy copies have been received and instructs parties to deliver hard courtesy copies to Dept. 302 ASAP. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JOSEPH SALESKY'S Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award.

Continued to 5/16/23 at 9:30am. The Court sets a briefing schedule: Opposition to request to vacate due by 4/28/23, replis on Opposition and origianla motion due by 5/8/23, Hearing - 5/16/23 at 9:30 a.m.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-517-5439, spham28@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
